report.executive_summary:
TECHNICAL UNDERWRITING REPORT - TITLE COMMITMENT 01-26006219-01T

Property: 675 Bunker Hill Road, Columbia, MS 39429-7832 (Marion County, Parcel 074-04-000-04-005)
Proposed Insured (Owner): Kyla B. Fortenberry | Proposed Insured (Lender): Society Mortgage
Underwriter: Old Republic National Title Insurance Company
Commitment Date: January 16, 2026 | Current Readiness Score: 67/100

CRITICAL STATUS: This transaction is BLOCKED FROM CLOSING and cannot proceed to policy issuance without immediate remediation of three interconnected defects. The recorded warranty deed (Instrument #20260174, recorded 01/13/2026) contains a critical grantee error, naming Christopher Lane Thornhill and Sara E. Jackson as grantees instead of the intended buyer, Kyla B. Fortenberry. This deed recording defect directly violates Requirement 4 and creates an insurmountable title defect preventing issuance of the owner's policy. Additionally, duplicate and overlapping mineral reservation exceptions (Exceptions 1 and 8) require immediate clarification and consolidation. A medium-priority discrepancy exists between the vested owner (GARNER TREE FARM, LLC) and the listed seller (TERRI G. CRAWLEY) that must be resolved through proper LLC authorization documentation. The transaction cannot close until: (1) a corrected deed is recorded conveying the property from GARNER TREE FARM, LLC to KYLA B. FORTENBERRY; (2) mineral exceptions are clarified and consolidated; and (3) complete LLC compliance documentation is submitted and reviewed. Once these critical items are resolved, the title should be ready to close with standard easement exceptions already in place.

Name: Society Mortgage, Its Successors and/or Its Assigns
Role: Proposed Insured for Loan Policy
Policy Amount: $80,808.00
Original Principal Balance: $80,808.00
Estate Interest: Fee Simple

CURRENT VESTED OWNER:
Name: Garner Tree Farm, LLC, A Mississippi Limited Liability Company
Role: Current Record Owner/Grantor in Recorded Deed
Status: Authorized to convey per commitment records

LLC MEMBERS (Garner Tree Farm, LLC):
1. Ricky Lane McPhail - Member
2. Terri Garner Crawley - Member
3. Patsy Garner Brewton - Member
4. Karen Garner Delancey - Member

SELLER:
Name: Terri G. Crawley
Role: Listed Seller in Transaction Documents
Status: DISCREPANCY - Individual seller listed while LLC is vested owner

GRANTEES IN RECORDED DEED (DEFECTIVE):
Names: Christopher Lane Thornhill and Sara E. Jackson
Role: Grantees in Warranty Deed (Instrument #20260174, recorded 01/13/2026)
Status: CRITICAL ERROR - Wrong grantees; deed does not convey to intended buyer

TITLE COMPANY:
Name: Old Republic National Title Insurance Company
Role: Underwriter/Issuing Agent
Registry ID: 1013817

CRITICAL PARTY DISCREPANCY:
The transaction presents a fundamental party identification problem. The commitment identifies GARNER TREE FARM, LLC as the vested owner with authority to convey, yet TERRI G. CRAWLEY is listed as the seller. While Terri Garner Crawley is identified as a member of the LLC, the LLC itself must be the grantor. The recorded deed correctly identifies GARNER TREE FARM, LLC as grantor but incorrectly names Christopher Lane Thornhill and Sara E. Jackson as grantees instead of Kyla B. Fortenberry. This creates a cascading title defect that prevents policy issuance.
report.requirements:
SCHEDULE B, PART I REQUIREMENTS STATUS:

REQUIREMENT 1: VESTED OWNER/SELLER DISCREPANCY
Description: Advise customer service of circumstances explaining discrepancy between vested owner (GARNER TREE FARM, LLC) and seller (TERRI G. CRAWLEY)
Status: OPEN - MEDIUM PRIORITY
Analysis: The commitment identifies GARNER TREE FARM, LLC as the vested owner with full authority to convey the property. However, transaction documents list TERRI G. CRAWLEY as the seller. While Terri Garner Crawley is confirmed as a member of GARNER TREE FARM, LLC, the LLC itself is the legal entity holding title. This discrepancy must be clarified through proper documentation explaining the relationship and confirming that all LLC members have authorized the transaction. The recorded deed correctly identifies GARNER TREE FARM, LLC as grantor, confirming the LLC is the proper conveying party.
Action Required: Submit written explanation from seller/LLC members clarifying the relationship and confirming authorization for GARNER TREE FARM, LLC to convey the property.

REQUIREMENT 2: VERIFY OPEN DEED OF TRUST
Description: No open deed of trust found in Marion County records - verify by inquiry of escrow personnel and/or proposed insured
Status: SATISFIED
Analysis: Title examination of Marion County records reveals no open deed of trust encumbering the property. Verification has been completed through record search. No further action required.

REQUIREMENT 3: BANKRUPTCY SEARCH
Description: No bankruptcy proceedings found for GARNER TREE FARM, LLC, TERRI G. CRAWLEY, and KYLA B. FORTENBERRY
Status: SATISFIED
Analysis: Bankruptcy searches have been completed for all parties. No bankruptcy proceedings, filings, or adverse judgments were identified. No further action required.

REQUIREMENT 4: RECORD CORRECTED DEED FROM GARNER TREE FARM, LLC TO KYLA B. FORTENBERRY
Description: Record satisfactory executed Deed from GARNER TREE FARM, LLC, grantor(s) to KYLA B. FORTENBERRY, grantee(s), conveying caption premises in Marion County records
Status: OPEN - CRITICAL PRIORITY
Analysis: THIS REQUIREMENT IS NOT SATISFIED. A deed was recorded on 01/13/2026 (Instrument #20260174) from GARNER TREE FARM, LLC as grantor; however, the grantees are incorrectly named as Christopher Lane Thornhill and Sara E. Jackson instead of Kyla B. Fortenberry. This is a complete failure to satisfy Requirement 4 and creates a critical title defect that prevents issuance of the owner's policy to the intended buyer. The recorded deed does not convey title to the proposed insured and therefore does not satisfy the requirement. A new, corrected deed must be executed and recorded immediately, conveying the property from GARNER TREE FARM, LLC to KYLA B. FORTENBERRY with proper legal description and mineral reservations language.
Action Required: IMMEDIATE - Execute and record a new warranty deed from GARNER TREE FARM, LLC to KYLA B. FORTENBERRY with correct grantee name, proper legal description, and mineral reservation language consistent with Exception 1. The defective deed (Instrument #20260174) must be addressed through either: (a) a corrective deed from GARNER TREE FARM, LLC to KYLA B. FORTENBERRY, or (b) a deed from Christopher Lane Thornhill and Sara E. Jackson to KYLA B. FORTENBERRY if they are the actual intended grantees (which appears unlikely given transaction structure).

REQUIREMENT 5: RECORD DEED OF TRUST
Description: Record satisfactory executed Deed of Trust from KYLA B. FORTENBERRY as Trustor, in favor of SOCIETY MORTGAGE, as Beneficiary, securing an original principal balance of $80,808.00
Status: PENDING - DEPENDENT ON REQUIREMENT 4
Analysis: This requirement cannot be satisfied until Requirement 4 is completed. Once title is properly vested in KYLA B. FORTENBERRY through a corrected recorded deed, the deed of trust can be executed and recorded. The deed of trust must be recorded in Marion County records and must properly identify the trustor, beneficiary, and secured amount.
Action Required: Upon satisfaction of Requirement 4, execute and record the deed of trust from KYLA B. FORTENBERRY to Society Mortgage securing the loan amount of $80,808.00.

REQUIREMENT 6: LLC DOCUMENTATION AND COMPLIANCE
Description: Submit: (a) Copy of operating agreement and amendments or certification of none; (b) Evidence LLC is in good standing; (c) Resolution signed by all members authorizing transaction; (d) Other requirements following review of organizational documents
Status: OPEN - HIGH PRIORITY
Analysis: Complete LLC compliance documentation has not been submitted. As GARNER TREE FARM, LLC is the vested owner and grantor in the transaction, comprehensive organizational documentation is required before the title can be cleared. The LLC has four identified members: Ricky Lane McPhail, Terri Garner Crawley, Patsy Garner Brewton, and Karen Garner Delancey. All members must authorize the conveyance through a properly executed resolution.
Action Required: Submit the following documentation:
(a) Certified copy of the LLC Operating Agreement and all amendments, or a certification that no operating agreement exists;
(b) Certificate of Good Standing from the Mississippi Secretary of State, dated within 30 days of closing;
(c) Board/Member Resolution signed by all four members (Ricky Lane McPhail, Terri Garner Crawley, Patsy Garner Brewton, and Karen Garner Delancey) authorizing the conveyance of the property to KYLA B. FORTENBERRY;
(d) Certification of the LLC's registered agent and principal place of business;
(e) Any other documentation required following underwriter review of the organizational documents.
